title: Enhanced Survival Servers LITE
description: This is like Enhanced Survival Servers modpack but with more FPS 🚀
body:
# Enhanced Survival Servers LITE 🚀

This is like my other Modpack but with more FPS for people with lower-end PC's

[Enhanced Surival Servers (NOT LITE)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/enhanced-survival-servers)


# What do we have to offer
It improves the visuals, performance and has some great QOL mods.

# What is the difference from Enhanced Survival Servers
For example we have removed Xaero's world map and minimap, ReplayMod and EMI! Added performance mod "Concurrent Chunk Management Engine" 

# Mod Loader
Enhanced Survival Servers LITE 🚀 run's on fabric for the best experience and most FPS!

# For Who?
For people who are looking for optimization and vannila like experience on most multiplayer survival servers.
